guardrails: This artifact refreshes the remaining implementation plan after W1.5.207 high-risk HITL review context evidence.
No FR item is marked accepted and EXIT-P1-1 remains not_ready.
W1.5.207 mirrors the current evidence map buckets after FR-018 moved to runtime_bridge_needs_a4_review.
FR-015 restore/continue implementation remains blocked until ADR-0012 or another accepted contract is available.

repair_track.objective: Re-plan only the remaining runtime-backed desktop behavior needed before FR-015 can move to A4 acceptance review; FR-015 remains blocked on accepted restore semantics.
entry_criteria: Use W1.5.207 FR evidence map as the current source of truth for remaining implementation gaps.
Keep A4-ready bridge items out of this implementation plan.
Preserve metadata-only evidence boundaries for snapshot paths.
planned_repair_steps: Define or accept a snapshot ledger projection before surfacing snapshots/snapshots.jsonl automatic and explicit snapshot entries in Desktop.
Define or accept restore-to-snapshot semantics before implementing Git-backed restore and continue execution for FR-015.
planned_verification: Targeted visual smoke or reviewer capture only after implementation evidence exists
